title: Street Fighter 6/Version/1.09 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 1.09 Game Version 1.09 date February 5, 2025 Summary Mai Release. Minor bug fixes. Links Patch Notes Mai Patch Mai released Universal Changes Perfect Parry vs. Multi-hit Attacks Re-applied a fix that prevents later hits of a multi-hit move from being canceled after a Perfect Parry This most notably effects Drive Impact punishes against moves like M. Bison's OD Psycho Crusher and Lily's Windclad OD Condor Spire Drive Impact Fixed issue where the input buffer time after recovery was shorter than usual if the DI whiffed after absorbing an attack Character Adjustments Akuma Forward Ashura Senku (6KKK) Expanded throw hurtbox backwards to make it harder to avoid throws when passing through opponent Blanka Drive Reversal No longer moves backward on the first frame Cammy SA2 / Air SA2 (214214P / j.214214P) Fixed issue where move would not K.O. the opponent when trading hits Chun-Li 2LK Fixed issue where move could not be canceled into a special when parried by the opponent Tenku Kick (Modern Controls: 214X~2H) Fixed issue where Modern control version had a different jump cancel timing on hit Dee Jay Threebeat Combo (5LP~MK~MK) Second attack can now come out while holding a downward direction Ed Psycho Knuckle Lv.1 (5[HP]) Fixed issue where opponents could not move backwards after being hit late during this move's active frames Kimberly Drive Reversal No longer moves backward on the first frame SA1 (236236K) Fixed issue where move would not K.O. the opponent when trading hits SA2 / Air SA2 (214214P / j.214214P) Fixed issue where move would not K.O. the opponent when trading hits M. Bison Drive Impact Forward movement now begins on frame 2 instead of frame 13 Hitbox, hurtbox, armor box, and collision box adjusted to keep overall range and properties similar to before Manon Rond-point (236K/KK) Fixed issue where the move could not be canceled into a Super when parried by the opponent Marisa OD Dimachaerus (214PP) Super cancel buffer window shifted forward from frame 2 → frame 10 Less likely to get accidental SA2 cancel when inputting 6P follow-up Rashid SA1 (236236K) Fixed issue where move would not K.O. the opponent when trading hits Fixed issue where knockdown time was much shorter when trading hits Terry Forward Walk Adjusted animation so that the central axis of the character more closely matches his position (purely a visual change) Zangief Back Walk Fixed issue where the first frame moved forward during Burnout

lists.text: Mai released

items.text: Mai released
items.html: Mai released

lists.text: Perfect Parry vs. Multi-hit Attacks Re-applied a fix that prevents later hits of a multi-hit move from being canceled after a Perfect Parry This most notably effects Drive Impact punishes against moves like M. Bison's OD Psycho Crusher and Lily's Windclad OD Condor Spire Drive Impact Fixed issue where the input buffer time after recovery was shorter than usual if the DI whiffed after absorbing an attack

items.text: Perfect Parry vs. Multi-hit Attacks Re-applied a fix that prevents later hits of a multi-hit move from being canceled after a Perfect Parry This most notably effects Drive Impact punishes against moves like M. Bison's OD Psycho Crusher and Lily's Windclad OD Condor Spire
items.html:
Perfect Parry vs. Multi-hit Attacks
  • Re-applied a fix that prevents later hits of a multi-hit move from being canceled after a Perfect Parry
  • This most notably effects Drive Impact punishes against moves like M. Bison's OD Psycho Crusher and Lily's Windclad OD Condor Spire

items.text: Drive Impact Fixed issue where the input buffer time after recovery was shorter than usual if the DI whiffed after absorbing an attack
items.html:
Drive Impact
  • Fixed issue where the input buffer time after recovery was shorter than usual if the DI whiffed after absorbing an attack
